## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Marcel Santilli (fwd.digital) and Zach Cusimano to explore potential collaboration and Chief of Staff role.](https://fathom.video/share/bXKUSB-8EDB2zrWxbKB2uziwqRtXhxiH?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Zach has extensive experience in startups, including co-founding a mobile app company and working at People.ai](https://fathom.video/share/bXKUSB-8EDB2zrWxbKB2uziwqRtXhxiH?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)
  - [Marcel's company, fwd.digital, is growing rapidly, offering AI-powered marketing services with a pod structure](https://fathom.video/share/bXKUSB-8EDB2zrWxbKB2uziwqRtXhxiH?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [fwd.digital is seeking a Chief of Staff to help with business operations, client operations, and people/hiring](https://fathom.video/share/bXKUSB-8EDB2zrWxbKB2uziwqRtXhxiH?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)
  - [Both parties expressed mutual interest in exploring ways to work together, potentially starting with a small project](https://fathom.video/share/bXKUSB-8EDB2zrWxbKB2uziwqRtXhxiH?tab=summary&timestamp=1618.0)

## Topics

### Zach's Background

  - [Co-founded first no-code mobile app builder for SMBs, scaled to 100 employees and $13M ARR](https://fathom.video/share/bXKUSB-8EDB2zrWxbKB2uziwqRtXhxiH?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
  - [Joined People.ai early (15 employees), helped scale to 350 employees over 6 years](https://fathom.video/share/bXKUSB-8EDB2zrWxbKB2uziwqRtXhxiH?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)
  - [Roles included go-to-market, Chief of Staff, and People operations](https://fathom.video/share/bXKUSB-8EDB2zrWxbKB2uziwqRtXhxiH?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)
  - [Recently took time off, did advisory work, now seeking full-time roles](https://fathom.video/share/bXKUSB-8EDB2zrWxbKB2uziwqRtXhxiH?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)

### fwd.digital Overview

  - [Rapidly growing AI-powered marketing services company](https://fathom.video/share/bXKUSB-8EDB2zrWxbKB2uziwqRtXhxiH?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)
  - [\~24 employees, 30 customers, 6 pods structure](https://fathom.video/share/bXKUSB-8EDB2zrWxbKB2uziwqRtXhxiH?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)
  - [Offers fractional CMO services with AI workflows and human expertise](https://fathom.video/share/bXKUSB-8EDB2zrWxbKB2uziwqRtXhxiH?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)
  - [Recently incorporated as C-corp, currently managing rapid growth and considering fundraising](https://fathom.video/share/bXKUSB-8EDB2zrWxbKB2uziwqRtXhxiH?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)

### Chief of Staff Role at fwd.digital

  - [Three main areas of focus:](https://fathom.video/share/bXKUSB-8EDB2zrWxbKB2uziwqRtXhxiH?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)
    1.  Run the business (operations, finance, sales)
    2.  Leadership team support and accountability
    3.  Client operations
  - [Seeking "founder mentality" individuals who can handle high-level strategy and hands-on tasks](https://fathom.video/share/bXKUSB-8EDB2zrWxbKB2uziwqRtXhxiH?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Flexible on exact structure (could be 1-3 hires)](https://fathom.video/share/bXKUSB-8EDB2zrWxbKB2uziwqRtXhxiH?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)

### Next Steps Discussion

  - [Marcel proposed working together on a small paid project to test fit](https://fathom.video/share/bXKUSB-8EDB2zrWxbKB2uziwqRtXhxiH?tab=summary&timestamp=1636.0)
  - [Zach offered to share expertise in 5 areas and discuss fundraising](https://fathom.video/share/bXKUSB-8EDB2zrWxbKB2uziwqRtXhxiH?tab=summary&timestamp=1703.0)
  - [Potential for in-person meeting on a Tuesday (office day)](https://fathom.video/share/bXKUSB-8EDB2zrWxbKB2uziwqRtXhxiH?tab=summary&timestamp=1755.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Zach to follow up with 5 areas of expertise and potential problem-solving ideas](https://fathom.video/share/bXKUSB-8EDB2zrWxbKB2uziwqRtXhxiH?tab=summary&timestamp=1715.0)
  - [Both to consider collaboration options over the weekend](https://fathom.video/share/bXKUSB-8EDB2zrWxbKB2uziwqRtXhxiH?tab=summary&timestamp=1749.0)
  - [Discuss potential in-person meeting or further conversations](https://fathom.video/share/bXKUSB-8EDB2zrWxbKB2uziwqRtXhxiH?tab=summary&timestamp=1755.0)
  - [Explore small project or advisory engagement as a starting point](https://fathom.video/share/bXKUSB-8EDB2zrWxbKB2uziwqRtXhxiH?tab=summary&timestamp=1636.0)
